# Speed Baccarat Malaysia

> Free online baccarat game for Malaysian players. No download, no registration. Play instantly in your browser.

## About This Game

Speed Baccarat Malaysia is a free browser-based baccarat game designed for Malaysian players.

- **Live Game**: https://johmark2026-svg.github.io/speed-baccarat-malaysia-tips/
- **Strategy Guide**: https://www.zzg236.com/speed-baccarat-malaysia-tips/speed-baccarat-malaysia-tips.html
- **Source Code**: https://github.com/johmark2026-svg/speed-baccarat-malaysia-tips

## How to Play

Pick Player, Banker, or Tie. Add chips and click DEAL. Closest to 9 wins. Banker pays 0.95x, Player pays 1x, Tie pays 8x.
